passes.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
Ensure ARIA attributes are used as described in the specification of the element's role
Ensure elements do not use deprecated roles
Ensure aria-hidden="true" is not present on the document body.
Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
Ensure buttons have discernible text
Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element
Ensure form field does not have multiple label elements
Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Ensure the lang attribute of the <html> element has a valid value
Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant amount
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

passes.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
Ensure ARIA attributes are used as described in the specification of the element's role
Ensure elements do not use deprecated roles
Ensure aria-hidden="true" is not present on the document body.
Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
Ensure buttons have discernible text
Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element
Ensure form field does not have multiple label elements
Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Ensure the lang attribute of the <html> element has a valid value
Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant amount
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

passes.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
Ensure ARIA attributes are used as described in the specification of the element's role
Ensure elements do not use deprecated roles
Ensure aria-hidden="true" is not present on the document body.
Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
Ensure buttons have discernible text
Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element
Ensure form field does not have multiple label elements
Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Ensure the lang attribute of the <html> element has a valid value
Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant amount
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

violations.description: Ensure every form element has a label

any.message: Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
Element does not have an explicit <label>
aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Element has no title attribute
Element has an empty placeholder attribute
Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

nodes.html: <input class="k-hex-value k-input-inner" placeholder="" autocomplete="off" type="text" value="#b88484AA">
nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
  Element does not have an explicit <label>
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute
  Element has an empty placeholder attribute
  Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

passes.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
Ensure ARIA attributes are used as described in the specification of the element's role
Ensure elements do not use deprecated roles
Ensure aria-hidden="true" is not present on the document body.
Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
Ensure buttons have discernible text
Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element
Ensure form field does not have multiple label elements
Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Ensure the lang attribute of the <html> element has a valid value
Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant amount
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
Ensure buttons have discernible text
Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element
Ensure form field does not have multiple label elements
Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Ensure the lang attribute of the <html> element has a valid value
Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant amount
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

violations.description: Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space
violations.help: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

any.message: Target has insufficient size (14px by 14px, should be at least 24px by 24px)

relatedNodes.html: <div role="textbox" aria-label="Color gradient picker, color #b88484AA" tabindex="0" class="k-colorgradient">

any.message: Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 14px instead of at least 24px.

nodes.html: <div class="k-hsv-draghandle k-d..." role="slider" aria-label="Color well with two-..." aria-valuetext="Saturation 50, Light..." aria-orientation="undefined" tabindex="0" style="top: 50px; left: 73p...">

passes.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
Ensure ARIA attributes are used as described in the specification of the element's role
Ensure elements do not use deprecated roles
Ensure aria-hidden="true" is not present on the document body.
Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
Ensure buttons have discernible text
Ensure each HTML document contains a non-empty <title> element
Ensure form field does not have multiple label elements
Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Ensure the lang attribute of the <html> element has a valid value
Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> can scale a significant amount
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space
